features: Pack of 20 High Quality Square 80mm Pads / Wipes
They have a soft side for gentle cleaning and a rough side for tougher algae deposits
Identical to Orb Cleaning Pads but thicker and tougher
description: Product description Our aquarium cleaning pads have a soft side for gentle cleaning and a slightly rough side for tougher algae deposits. Please make sure that you don't get anything i.e sand or gravel in-between the pad and the aquarium surface as this will scratch your aquarium. These can be used on all aquarium types as they are non scratch. We do suggest trying them on an inconspicuous area first to check if you haven't used them before. These are ideal for Orb aquariums as they are identical to the ones Orb supply in their kits. Each pad measures 80mm x 80mm Legal Disclaimer Any brand names mentioned are for reference only and belong to the owner.
